subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down His bounty, which is a feast descended from the heaven of His grace and speaketh with every tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل النعمه و انها مائده نزلت من سماء فضله و هی تعبر بکل لسان
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @law of pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @wisdom [hikmat]
